item.name: Uzumaki
item.description:
One would not be alone in saying this primordial beast haunts their dreams.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This creature's defining feature is its tooth-lined jaw, which spirals out and forward in a horrific loop. This exposed lower mandible can never be completely closed, but this is hardly necessary with the level of carnage that simply whipping its head around to saw through its prey creates.
